description_long: This object consists of a pair of dark-colored slip-on shoes with a prominent buckle detail on the upper side. The shoes have a closed toe and a low heel, with a slightly rounded front and a back that rises to cover the heel. The material appears to be leather or a similar synthetic, with a matte finish and visible stitching along the edges. The soles are thick and likely made of rubber, providing durability and grip for urban walking. The shoes are designed for comfort and everyday use, suitable for both casual and semi-formal urban environments.
description: A pair of dark slip-on shoes with buckles, closed toes, and thick rubber soles, designed for comfortable urban wear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the profile of one shoe with a visible buckle and the full length of the sole.
description_view_1: Top-down view displaying both shoes side by side, highlighting the buckles and the shape of the toe boxes.
description_view_2: Opposite side view of a single shoe, again showing the buckle and the overall silhouette.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the backs of both shoes, emphasizing the heel coverage and the closed design.
